globalNews.title: France records 2,025 excess deaths at peak of heatwave as Europe braces for more extreme weather
globalNews.summary: Forecasters are warning of further extreme temperatures on the continent in the next few days.

globalNews.title: Ukrainian suspect hunted by police after Monaco bomb attack was 'disguised as a man'
globalNews.summary: Officials believe the suspect may not have acted alone and spent days casing out scene of the attack.

globalNews.title: Nasa launches mission to save falling space telescope
globalNews.summary: A Nasa-funded robot has blasted off to catch a falling telescope in mid-orbit and blast it back to safety before it burns up.

globalNews.title: On the Strait of Hormuz, BBC finds seized ships and shark fishermen as uneasy calm returns
globalNews.summary: The BBC travels to the city of Bandar Abbas - the first international journalists to visit the Iranian side of the strait.

globalNews.title: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
globalNews.summary: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: EU crypto rulebook faces enforcement challenge as MiCA transition ends
cryptoNews.summary: Lawyers and industry executives expect EU regulators to enforce MiCA differently as unauthorized crypto companies are required to wind down operations.

cryptoNews.title: Upbit says it only expressed interest in future OUSD participation
cryptoNews.summary: Upbit said it only expressed interest in potentially joining the OpenStandard ecosystem in the future, as several South Korean firms distanced themselves from the OUSD initiative.

cryptoNews.title: Belgian police arrest suspected phishing gang leader tied to $572K theft
cryptoNews.summary: Belgian authorities say a European phishing gang stole over $572,000 from victims before laundering the proceeds through cryptocurrency.

cryptoNews.title: StanChart joins ESMA's first MiCA register update since deadline
cryptoNews.summary: ESMA publishes its first post-deadline MiCA register update, adding 37 crypto-asset service providers, including Standard Chartered and FalconX.

aiNews.title: Mark Zuckerberg tells staff that AI agents haven’t progressed as quickly as he’d hoped
aiNews.summary: At an internal meeting, the Meta CEO reportedly said that AI development efforts were not moving as quickly as anticipated.

aiNews.title: Jersey Mike’s IPO illustrates how bad the AI hype has become
aiNews.summary: Just for kicks, I took a look at Jersey Mike's IPO documents. Surely a sandwich shop would have no need to mention AI. But lo and behold.

aiNews.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
aiNews.summary: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.

aiNews.title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
aiNews.summary: The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.

aiNews.title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
aiNews.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company’s equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI
